title: oxalis trilliifolia
intro: Oxalis trilliifolia, also known as wood sorrel or mountain sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the oxalis family and is native to the western regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce symptoms of urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Oxalis trilliifolia include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Oxalis trilliifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
